PLAN_STATE: Start from the baseline tour and look for obvious crossing removals and cluster-respecting reorderings.
PLAN_STATE: Use the natural geographic clusters: southwest {13,19,18,0}, west/northwest {6,1,2,17,5,4}, center {15,14,16,8,9}, east {10,11,12,3,7}.
PLAN_STATE: Try to connect clusters in a monotone outer cycle to reduce long zigzags.

PLAN_STATE: Keep feasibility simple: one full Hamiltonian cycle, no repeats, no omissions.

PLAN_STATE: Otherwise retain baseline structure with local swaps only.
